name: Category: 2010 Top 25 - Insecure Interaction Between Components
description: This is a Category grouping weaknesses from the 'Insecure Interaction Between Components' section of the 2010 CWE/SANS Top 25. Includes CWE-78, CWE-79, CWE-89, CWE-209, CWE-352, CWE-362, CWE-434, CWE-601. Cannot be used for vulnerability mapping.
